response.overview: It's just a fact that bush was bigger back in the 90s! For those who liked to whack, it was worth running through the jungle to get to that sweet pussy every time. And now Hustler is bringing back the bush in this four-hour release that features all the short and curlies you can shake a dick at! Stephanie Swift, Angel and Brooke Fields top the cast of this star-studded retro throwback that lets you part the curtains for all the hardcore you can handle.
response.title: Classic Bush
